reviews.comment:
Siempre nos atienden de forma excelente. Se puede usar la aplicación para pagar con el teléfono. Los chicos te asesoran de 10.

(Translated by Google)
They always provide excellent service. You can use the app to pay with your phone. The staff are incredibly helpful.

reviews.comment:
Muy limpios los baños, vigilancia y buena anuencia en surtidores y minimercado

(Translated by Google)
The restrooms were very clean, there was good security, and the gas pumps and convenience store were well-maintained.

reviews.comment:
La atencion todo muy lento. Poco personal  . Lo hacen todo despacio  ponen la manguera para que tarde en cargar. Mientras atienden a otro.

(Translated by Google)
The service is incredibly slow. There's not enough staff. They do everything slowly, even positioning the hose so it takes forever to fill, all while they attend to another customer.
